svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.6 Chrome/144.0.7559.236 Electron/40.8.4 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram id="latest-agent-flow" name="Latest Agent Flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-899" dy="-267" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1750" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=28;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="AI Requirement Tool - Latest Agent Flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="820" x="50" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;fontColor=#4b5563;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="One chat entry point chooses one lane: General Chat, Requirement SDLC Agent, or PM Status Agent. Lanes are separated so the reader can follow each flow left to right without crossing arrows." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="1180" x="50" y="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="entry-band" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=4;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;" value="Shared Entry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="1660" x="45" y="126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="general-band" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9fafb;strokeColor=#d1d5db;fontColor=#4b5563;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=4;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;" value="General Chat Lane" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="1660" x="45" y="286" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="requirement-band" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#bbf7d0;fontColor=#047857;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=4;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;" value="Requirement SDLC Lane" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="155" width="1660" x="45" y="456" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-band" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff7ed;strokeColor=#fed7aa;fontColor=#c2410c;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=4;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;" value="PM Status Lane" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="285" width="1660" x="45" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#111827;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="User
PM / BA / Delivery lead" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="190" x="75" y="164" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="webui" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Web UI

PM demo buttons" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="215" x="335" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="/api/chat
Validate request
Load conversation state" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="225" x="625" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="router" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Intent Routing
Explicit mode first
Keyword / LLM fallback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="230" x="925" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="entry-note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Router activates exactly one lane below. Cross-lane arrows are intentionally omitted to keep the documentation view readable." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="390" x="1230" y="162" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="route-general" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9ca3af;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Selected route

Open Q&A
Clarification" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="220" x="345" y="318" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="general-llm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef2ff;strokeColor=#4f46e5;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="LLM Provider
OpenAI / DeepSeek" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="220" x="655" y="318" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="general-response" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9ca3af;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Assistant Response
Conversation answer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="220" x="965" y="318" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="route-req" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#059669;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Selected route
Requirement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="170" x="75" y="504" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="req-agent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#059669;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Requirement SDLC Agent
Draft backlog items
Run quality gate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="235" x="345" y="494" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="req-workflow" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#059669;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Requirement Workflow
Backlog draft
Quality evaluation
Approval state" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="98" width="240" x="670" y="486" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="req-integrations" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0d9488;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Delivery Integrations
LLM generation
Jira issue creation
Confluence page creation
RAG ingest / retrieval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="98" width="260" x="1000" y="486" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="req-output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9ca3af;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="Requirement Output
Jira links
Confluence page
Grounded context" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="225" x="1350" y="494" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="route-pm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#ea580c;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Selected route
PM Status" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="170" x="75" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-agent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#ea580c;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=14;arcSize=8;spacing=10;" value="PM Status Agent
Status request
Demo or live path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="220" x="315" y="748" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-demo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Demo Fixtures
On Track = Green
Delayed = Amber
Blocked = Red
No live API calls" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="220" x="610" y="686" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-scope" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffbeb;strokeColor=#f59e0b;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Scope Parser
Jira project from chat
Confluence space from chat" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="220" x="610" y="816" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-live" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfeff;strokeColor=#0891b2;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Live Readers
Jira Read Adapter
Confluence Read Adapter
Scoped search results" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="230" x="900" y="816" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-snapshot" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#ea580c;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Status Snapshot
Fixture data or live signals
Normalized PM inputs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="230" x="1210" y="736" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-report" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#ea580c;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="PM Report Renderer
Health color
Progress, risks, blockers
Next actions and sources" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="190" x="1490" y="736" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm-approval" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#0d9488;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Approved Write-back
Confluence status page
Only after approval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="190" x="1490" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9ca3af;fontColor=#111827;fontSize=12;arcSize=8;spacing=8;" value="Legend
Black: shared entry
Gray: general chat
Green: requirement workflow
Orange: PM live status
Red: PM demo path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="75" y="858" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 17px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 28px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: AI Requirement Tool - Latest Agent Flow

div.div: One chat entry point chooses one lane: General Chat, Requirement SDLC Agent, or PM Status Agent. Lanes are separated so the reader can follow each flow left to right without crossing arrows.
